surface.name: ClickHouse Cloud quick start: service + SQL console SHOW databases
surface.selection_basis: The official documentation presents this as the hosted path from account setup to Run a query in the SQL console. It reaches the requested first-success boundary without extending into post-success production work.

entry_point.developer_intent: A ClickHouse Cloud service accepts SHOW databases in its hosted SQL console and returns database rows.
assumed_prior_state: The developer has no prior ClickHouse setup for this journey.
The journey starts at account creation and stops at the first documented successful outcome.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: Connect using SQL console and run SHOW databases
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: A ClickHouse Cloud service accepts SHOW databases in its hosted SQL console and returns database rows.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The SQL console displays the result set for SHOW databases.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: The official documentation leads the developer to: Run a query in the SQL console.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: This is the first observable happy-path result on the selected ClickHouse Cloud quick start: service + SQL console SHOW databases surface; later configuration and production hardening occur after success.

prerequisites.requirement: A ClickHouse Cloud service created through the Cloud quick start.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to ClickHouse Cloud.
primary_path.input: A new developer starting at account creation
primary_path.output: The ClickHouse Cloud console is accessible.
primary_path.success_signal: The ClickHouse Cloud console is accessible.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Create a ClickHouse Cloud service and wait until it is ready.
primary_path.output: The service reports a ready/running state.
primary_path.success_signal: The service reports a ready/running state.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Open the service SQL console and run SHOW databases.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Confirm that the SQL console displays database names.
primary_path.output: A result set containing databases is visible.
primary_path.success_signal: A result set containing databases is visible.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

friction_gates.description: Service creation has a platform-managed provisioning wait before the SQL console is usable.

sources.title: Run a query in the SQL console
sections_used: Run a query in the SQL console
evidence_supported: A ClickHouse Cloud service accepts SHOW databases in its hosted SQL console and returns database rows.
The SQL console displays the result set for SHOW databases.

uncertainties.question: Does the current fresh-account UI exactly match every navigation label in the documented Run a query in the SQL console path?
uncertainties.impact: Navigation wording may differ while the required outcome and boundary remain the same.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: The official documentation establishes the journey but account-specific UI state can vary.
